modules.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.document_line
documentation: Copyright (C) 2021 - TODAY Gabriel Cardoso de Faria - Kmee

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.document_line.FiscalDocumentLine.create
documentation:
Override the create method to ensure it filters out account.move.line records
that lack a valid document_id or fiscal_operation_line_id. Prevent the
creation  of fiscal document lines without these mandatory fields to avoid
system crashes due to invalid records. If the conditions are not met, return an
empty list instead of creating any records. This supports the creation of
account.move.line records with NULL values for fiscal_document_line_id where
necessary.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.account_tax.AccountTax.compute_all
documentation:
Returns all information required to apply taxes
    (in self + their children in case of a tax goup).
    We consider the sequence of the parent for group of taxes.
        Eg. considering letters as taxes and alphabetic order
        as sequence :
        [G, B([A, D, F]), E, C] will be computed as [A, D, F, C, E, G]
RETURN: {
    'total_excluded': 0.0,    # Total without taxes
    'total_included': 0.0,    # Total with taxes
    'taxes': [{               # One dict for each tax in self
                              # and their children
        'id': int,
        'name': str,
        'amount': float,
        'sequence': int,
        'account_id': int,
        'refund_account_id': int,
        'analytic': boolean,
    }]
}

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.account_chart_template.AccountChartTemplate._load_template
documentation:
If the CoA is installed before l10n_br_account, at least we trigger
load_fiscal_taxes from the l10n_br_account/hooks.py for the demo CoA's.
With this override, we also ensure these demo CoA or any custom CoA
will get its account taxes properly linked to fiscal taxes when it is
installed after l10n_br_account.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.account_chart_template.AccountChartTemplate.load_fiscal_taxes
documentation:
Relate account taxes with fiscal taxes to enable the Brazilian
tax engine to kick in with the installed chart of account.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.document.FiscalDocument.create
documentation:
It's not allowed to create a fiscal document line without a document_type_id
anyway. But instead of letting Odoo crash in this case we simply avoid creating
the record. This makes it possible to create an account.move without a
fiscal_document_id despite the _inherits system:
Odoo will write NULL as the value in this case.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.document.FiscalDocument.message_post
documentation:
broadcast message_post to all related account.move so
messages in a fiscal document chatter are visible in the
related account moves.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.ir_model_data.IrModelData._update_xmlids
documentation:
Because of the _inherits, Odoo naturally expects XML records
for account.move and account.move.line to have respectively a fiscal_document_id
and a fiscal_document_line_id. But in l10n_br_account we allow account moves
without fiscal documents. This override avoids crashing Odoo here.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.account_move_line.AccountMoveLine._get_fields_onchange_balance_model
documentation: TODO As the accounting behavior of taxes in Brazil is completely different,
for now the method for companies in Brazil brings an empty result.
You can correctly map this behavior later.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.account_move_line.AccountMoveLine._get_price_total_and_subtotal_model
documentation:
This method is used to compute 'price_total' & 'price_subtotal'.
\:param price_unit: The current price unit.
\:param quantity: The current quantity.
\:param discount: The current discount.
\:param currency: The line's currency.
\:param product: The line's product.
\:param partner: The line's partner.
\:param taxes: The applied taxes.
\:param move_type: The type of the move.
\:return: A dictionary containing 'price_subtotal' & 'price_total'.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.account_move_line.AccountMoveLine._onchange_fiscal_tax_ids
documentation:
Ao alterar o campo fiscal_tax_ids que contém os impostos fiscais,
são atualizados os impostos contábeis relacionados

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.account_move_line.AccountMoveLine._onchange_mark_recompute_taxes
documentation:
Recompute the dynamic onchange based on taxes.
If the edited line is a tax line, don't recompute anything as the
user must be able to set a custom value.

documentation: TODO: Por ora esta solução contorna o problema
Este erro está relacionado com o campo active implementado via localização
Este problema começou após este commit:

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.account_move.AccountMove.button_import_fiscal_document
documentation:
Import move fields and invoice lines from
the fiscal_document_id record if there is any new line
to import.
You can typically set fiscal_document_id to some l10n_br_fiscal.document
record that was imported previously and import its lines into the
current move.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.models.account_move.AccountMove.import_fiscal_document
documentation:
Import the data from an existing fiscal document into a new
invoice or into an existing invoice.
First it transfers the "shadowed" fields and fill the other
mandatory invoice fields.
The account.move onchanges of these fields are properly
triggered as if the invoice was filled manually.
Then it creates each account.move.line and fill them using
their fiscal_document_id onchange.

We could not override the super one because we need to inject extra BR fiscal

This is the base test suite for l10n_br_account with proper Brazilian
Charts of Accounts and Brazilian data.

see https://stackoverflow.com/questions/69091760/how-can-i-import-a-testclass-properly-to-inherit-from-without-it-being-run-as-a

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_account.tests.test_non_fiscal_move.TestCustomerInvoice.test_invoice_copy_with_dummy
documentation:
Test the functionality of copying an invoice while using a fiscal dummy.
Verify that the new invoice isn't recognized as a fiscal document,
the same fiscal dummy is used, and that no new entries were created.

This is a simple test for ensuring non fiscal account.move
doesn't create fiscal document(.line).
